holdings.infoBox: SAA is an equity ETF with a total of 607 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra SmallCap600 (SAA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of 600 US small-cap companies. SAA was launched on Jan 23, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.
